instructions.reason_for_call: You want to make a call to your uncle, David Chen.
instructions.known_info: You save his contact as David Chen.
instructions.unknown_info: You don't remember his phone numbers.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Previously preferred phone call is 2345-6789", "correct_information": "Phone number 2345-6789 is not in used anymore, should call at 9876-5432", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and make call to 9876-5432."}

instructions.reason_for_call: Your friend suddenly had a severe allergic reaction. You want to call Doctor Sarah Johnson to ask for help.
instructions.known_info: You saved Doctor Sarah's contact as Sarah Johnson. You remember Doctor Sarah said she responds to one of her phone numbers quicker. Tell agent about this in the beginning of the conversation.
instructions.unknown_info: You don't remember which specific phone number that she will respond quicker.

nl_assertions: {"misleading_information": "Default number is 5234-5678", "correct_information": "Should call at 5234-5679 for emergency matters", "evaluation_instruction": "Assess if the agent checked both contact list and contact history, identifies the knowledge conflict, and make call to 5234-5679."}

instructions.reason_for_call: You have complete your part for project Alpha and you wish to update Mr. John Smith about the progress.
